pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. First time doing something like this? I'm honestly pretty nervous but also excited — heard there's real money on the line here, so I'm trying to figure out what I'm getting into.

Yeah, first time for me too! I'm E, by the way. Same here — nervous and excited mixed together. I'm really hoping to take something home, so I'm trying to figure out how this all works before we get started. Have you heard anything specific about the rules yet?

Not much detail yet, honestly — just that there's a shared pool and we get to take money from it at some point. I'm guessing there's a catch though, right? Like maybe it's about timing or cooperation or something? Have you picked up on anything else from the organizers?

Nah, they've been pretty vague with me too. But yeah, there's definitely something more to it — games like this usually have some kind of twist. My gut says it might come down to whether people cooperate or try to grab as much as they can before others do. Either way, I'm planning to keep my eyes open and see how things play out once we actually start.

Yeah, that makes sense — cooperation versus everyone for themselves. Honestly, I'm leaning toward trying to work with people if I can, but I guess it depends on what happens when the game actually starts. You seem like you've got a good head on your shoulders though — maybe we can keep an eye out for each other once things get going?

I appreciate that, and yeah, I'm definitely open to working together if we can make it work. Let's see how things unfold, but I'm with you — if there's a way for us both to come out ahead, I'd rather do that than go full cutthroat. Just promise me you'll be straight with me about what you're thinking when the time comes?
Absolutely, I promise. I'll be straight with you — that's the only way this works anyway. Let's stick together and see what happens.
Sounds good — I'm glad we're on the same page. Let's keep it real with each other and figure this out together when the time comes.
Definitely. I mean it — we've got this. Just remember what we talked about when things get intense, yeah?
Yeah, I got you. When things get crazy, we stay calm and remember we said we'd be straight with each other. That's our anchor. Let's do this.
Hell yeah, we got this. No matter what happens in there, honesty and looking out for each other — that's what matters. Let's go make this work.
